provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Veshan battle-opera performance — two performers in ceremonial armor on an angular stage in a great hall, mid-swing with blunted weapons, mouths open in deep resonant song, crests flushing crimson with performance intensity, the audience visible as rows of Veshan on open-backed stone seats with tails absolutely still in rapt attention, warm amber and crimson stage lighting, bruises visible on performers' scales from rehearsal
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Partial hit — atmosphere and style correct, some species anatomy or concept details missed.
